title: Volumes of Truth
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Volumes of Truth''' was a religious text of the [[Jydan]] religion and its derivative, the [[Ni'Shaw-Dak Ministry|Ni'Shaw-Dak]] religion. It was probably used in other [[Ka'hren]] religions.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

The Volumes of Truth included the laws and ethic code of the multiple Jydan gods, written by the three prophets of each individual god (as opposed to the other holy text of Jydan, the [[Jydan Writings]], also written by the three prophets of each god but telling the god's ''teachings'').<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
